## Summary
- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation
- [ ] `python -m py_compile` passed for touched files
- [ ] local smoke check passed
- [ ] docs/config examples updated if needed

## Runtime Impact
- [ ] touches live scan flow
- [ ] touches recorder / paper simulation
- [ ] touches provider or execution path
- [ ] no production behavior change expected

## Notes
- rollout risk, follow-ups, or match scenarios to watch
